SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.pump

Class PumpDeadheadResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.pump.PumpDeadheadResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PumpDeadheadResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result of a PumpDeadheadAnalyzer pump deadhead and minimum-flow screening.

Holds the estimated shut-off (deadhead) discharge pressure, the comparison against the protected pressure rating and the minimum-flow recirculation temperature rise that supports the "No Flow" HAZOP cause for centrifugal pumps.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • PumpDeadheadResult

      public PumpDeadheadResult(double suctionPressureBara, double normalDischargePressureBara, double shutoffHeadRatio, double ratedDifferentialBara, double deadheadPressureBara, double protectedPressureRatingBara, boolean ratingDataProvided, double pressureMarginBara, boolean pressureRatingExceeded, double shutoffHeadM, double liquidDensityKgPerM3, double specificHeatJPerKgK, double minimumFlowEfficiency, double recirculationTempRiseK, boolean tempRiseDataAvailable, double maxAllowableTempRiseK, boolean tempRiseExceeded, PumpDeadheadAnalyzer.DeadheadVerdict verdict, List<String> warnings)
      Construct a pump deadhead result.
      Parameters:
      suctionPressureBara - pump suction pressure in bara
      normalDischargePressureBara - normal (rated) discharge pressure in bara
      shutoffHeadRatio - shut-off head as a multiple of rated differential head
      ratedDifferentialBara - rated differential pressure in bar
      deadheadPressureBara - estimated deadhead (shut-off) discharge pressure in bara
      protectedPressureRatingBara - protected system or casing pressure rating in bara; NaN when not supplied
      ratingDataProvided - true if a protected pressure rating was supplied
      pressureMarginBara - rating minus deadhead pressure in bar; negative when exceeded, NaN when no rating supplied
      pressureRatingExceeded - true if the deadhead pressure exceeds the protected rating
      shutoffHeadM - shut-off differential head in metres of liquid; NaN when density unknown
      liquidDensityKgPerM3 - liquid density used in kg/m3; NaN when not available
      specificHeatJPerKgK - liquid specific heat used in J/(kg K); NaN when not available
      minimumFlowEfficiency - pump efficiency assumed at minimum continuous flow
      recirculationTempRiseK - minimum-flow recirculation temperature rise in K; NaN when properties unavailable
      tempRiseDataAvailable - true if the temperature rise could be evaluated
      maxAllowableTempRiseK - maximum allowable temperature rise in K; NaN when not supplied
      tempRiseExceeded - true if the recirculation temperature rise exceeds the allowable
      verdict - the screening verdict
      warnings - list of warnings; never null

  • Method Details

    • getSuctionPressureBara

      public double getSuctionPressureBara()
      Gets the pump suction pressure.
      Returns:
      suction pressure in bara

      Gets the normal (rated) discharge pressure.

      protected pressure rating in bara; NaN when not supplied

      public boolean isRatingDataProvided()
      Indicates whether a protected pressure rating was supplied.
      Returns:
      true if rating data supplied

    • getPressureMarginBara

      public double getPressureMarginBara()
      Gets the margin between the protected rating and the deadhead pressure.
      Returns:
      margin in bar; negative when exceeded, NaN when no rating supplied

    • isPressureRatingExceeded

      public boolean isPressureRatingExceeded()
      Indicates whether the deadhead pressure exceeds the protected rating.
      Returns:
      true if the rating is exceeded

    • getShutoffHeadM

      public double getShutoffHeadM()
      Gets the shut-off differential head in metres of liquid.
      Returns:
      shut-off head in m; NaN when density unknown

    • getLiquidDensityKgPerM3

      Gets the liquid density used.
      Returns:
      density in kg/m3; NaN when not available

    • getSpecificHeatJPerKgK

      public double getSpecificHeatJPerKgK()
      Gets the liquid specific heat used.
      Returns:
      specific heat in J/(kg K); NaN when not available

    • getMinimumFlowEfficiency

      public double getMinimumFlowEfficiency()
      Gets the pump efficiency assumed at minimum continuous flow.
      Returns:
      minimum-flow efficiency (0,1]

    • getRecirculationTempRiseK

      public double getRecirculationTempRiseK()
      Gets the minimum-flow recirculation temperature rise.
      Returns:
      temperature rise in K; NaN when properties unavailable

    • isTempRiseDataAvailable

      public boolean isTempRiseDataAvailable()
      Indicates whether the recirculation temperature rise could be evaluated.
      Returns:
      true if temperature rise data is available

    • getMaxAllowableTempRiseK

      public double getMaxAllowableTempRiseK()
      Gets the maximum allowable temperature rise.
      Returns:
      allowable temperature rise in K; NaN when not supplied

    • isTempRiseExceeded

      public boolean isTempRiseExceeded()
      Indicates whether the recirculation temperature rise exceeds the allowable.
      Returns:
      true if the temperature rise is excessive

      public PumpDeadheadAnalyzer.DeadheadVerdict getVerdict()
      Gets the screening verdict.
      Returns:
      the deadhead verdict

      Gets the warnings raised during the screening.
      Returns:
      list of warnings; never null

      Serializes this result to a human-readable JSON string.
